headline: Netflix Monthly Subscriber Churn Still Best At 2%
summary: In terms of 'sign ups of new or returning subscribers,' the top two highest-performing services of the last 12-month period have been Paramount+ and Peacock -- averaging 2.5 million and 2.4 million respectively.
